## History & Politics
→ [Category index](history-politics/index.md)

| Topic | Description |
|---|---|
| Barack Obama inaugurated | Democrat Barack Obama was sworn in as the 44th President on January 20. |
| Miracle on the Hudson | US Airways Flight 1549 ditched in the Hudson River on January 15; all 155 survived. |
| Iran's Green Movement protests | Mass protests followed disputed presidential election results in June. |
| Fort Hood shooting | US Army psychiatrist Nidal Hasan opened fire at Fort Hood on November 5, killing 13. |
| Copenhagen Climate Conference (COP15) | The 15th UN Climate Change Conference convened December 7–18. |
| American Recovery and Reinvestment Act | President Obama signed the $787 billion stimulus on February 17. |

| H1N1 swine flu pandemic | WHO declared a Phase 6 pandemic on June 11 after a novel H1N1 strain emerged in April. |

| Bitcoin genesis block mined | Satoshi Nakamoto mined Block 0 on January 3, launching the world's first decentralized cryptocurrency. |
